glosses.yue: 專題報道; 特寫報道

sentences.target: Ich lese eine Reportage über die Stadt.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈleːzə ˈaɪ̯nə ʁepoʁˈtaːʒə ˈyːbɐ diː ʃtat./

translations.de: Ich lese eine Reportage über die Stadt.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈleːzə ˈaɪ̯nə ʁepoʁˈtaːʒə ˈyːbɐ diː ʃtat./
translations.en: I’m reading a report about the city.
translations.es: Estoy leyendo un reportaje sobre la ciudad.
translations.fr: Je lis un reportage sur la ville.
translations.it: Sto leggendo un reportage sulla città.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在读一篇关于这座城市的报道。
translations.yue: 我喺度睇一篇關於呢個城市嘅報導。
translations.pt: Estou lendo uma reportagem sobre a cidade.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đọc một bài phóng sự về thành phố.
translations.nl: Ik lees een reportage over de stad.
translations.hi: मैं शहर के बारे में एक रिपोर्ट पढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Διαβάζω ένα ρεπορτάζ για την πόλη.
translations.nb: Jeg leser en reportasje om byen.
translations.id: Saya sedang membaca sebuah laporan tentang kota.
translations.sv: Jag läser ett reportage om staden.
translations.da: Jeg læser en reportage om byen.
translations.ja: 街についての特集記事を読んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate.
Indefinite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Reportage' (direct object).
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'lese' (accusative).
Preposition governing accusative; heads a prepositional phrase indicating topic.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Stadt' within the PP.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'über' (prepositional complement, accusative).

sentences.target: Sie dreht gerade eine Reportage im Park.
sentences.reading: /ziː dʁeːt ɡəˈʁaːdə ˈaɪ̯nə ʁepoʁˈtaːʒə ɪm paʁk./

translations.de: Sie dreht gerade eine Reportage im Park.
translations.ipa: /ziː dʁeːt ɡəˈʁaːdə ˈaɪ̯nə ʁepoʁˈtaːʒə ɪm paʁk./
translations.en: She is filming a report in the park.
translations.es: Está grabando un reportaje en el parque.
translations.fr: Elle tourne un reportage au parc.
translations.it: Sta girando un servizio al parco.
translations.zh-Hans: 她正在公园里拍摄一条报道。
translations.yue: 佢而家喺公園拍緊一條報導。
translations.pt: Ela está filmando uma reportagem no parque.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đang quay một phóng sự trong công viên.
translations.nl: Ze filmt een reportage in het park.
translations.hu: Épp egy riportot forgat a parkban.
translations.hi: वह पार्क में एक रिपोर्ट फिल्मा रही है.
translations.nb: Hun filmer en reportasje i parken.
translations.id: Dia sedang merekam sebuah liputan di taman.
translations.sv: Hon filmar ett reportage i parken.
translations.ro: Ea filmează un reportaj în parc.
translations.da: Hun optager en reportage i parken.
translations.ja: 彼女は公園で特集を撮影しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative; here most likely 3rd person singular feminine subject.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate ('to film/shoot').
Adverb; temporal modifier indicating ongoing action.
Indefinite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Reportage' (direct object).
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'dreht' (accusative).
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a locative PP.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of 'im' (dative), indicating location.

sentences.target: Die Reportage läuft heute Abend im Fernsehen.
sentences.reading: /diː ʁepoʁˈtaːʒə lɔɪ̯ft ˈhɔɪ̯tə ˈaːbn̩t ɪm ˈfɛʁnzeːn./

translations.de: Die Reportage läuft heute Abend im Fernsehen.
translations.ipa: /diː ʁepoʁˈtaːʒə lɔɪ̯ft ˈhɔɪ̯tə ˈaːbn̩t ɪm ˈfɛʁnzeːn./
translations.en: The report is on TV tonight.
translations.es: El reportaje se emite esta noche en la tele.
translations.fr: Le reportage passe à la télé ce soir.
translations.it: Il servizio va in onda stasera in TV.
translations.ko: 그 리포트는 오늘 밤 TV에서 방송돼요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这条报道今晚在电视上播出。
translations.yue: 嗰條報導今晚喺電視播。
translations.ru: Этот репортаж покажут по телевизору сегодня вечером.
translations.pt: A reportagem vai ao ar hoje à noite na TV.
translations.vi: Phóng sự sẽ phát trên TV tối nay.
translations.nl: De reportage is vanavond op tv.
translations.uk: Репортаж покажуть сьогодні ввечері по телевізору.
translations.hu: A riport ma este lesz a tévében.
translations.hi: वह रिपोर्ट आज रात टीवी पर आएगी.
translations.pl: Reportaż będzie dziś wieczorem w telewizji.
translations.el: Το ρεπορτάζ προβάλλεται απόψε στην τηλεόραση.
translations.nb: Reportasjen går på TV i kveld.
translations.id: Liputan itu tayang di TV malam ini.
translations.cs: Reportáž běží dnes večer v televizi.
translations.da: Reportagen sendes i aften i fjernsynet.
translations.ja: その特集は今夜テレビで放送されます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular nominative; determiner of the subject 'Reportage'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive usage ('to run/air').
Adverb; temporal modifier.
Common noun, masculine singular; bare temporal noun in the expression 'heute Abend', functioning as a temporal adjunct (often accusative).
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a PP indicating medium/location.
Common noun, neuter singular; object of 'im' (dative), denotes the medium ('on TV').

sentences.target: Wir schauen die Reportage zusammen bei mir.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈʃaʊ̯ən diː ʁepoʁˈtaːʒə tsuˈzamən baɪ̯ miːɐ̯./

translations.de: Wir schauen die Reportage zusammen bei mir.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈʃaʊ̯ən diː ʁepoʁˈtaːʒə tsuˈzamən baɪ̯ miːɐ̯./
translations.en: We’re watching the report together at my place.
translations.es: Estamos viendo el reportaje juntos en mi casa.
translations.fr: On regarde le reportage ensemble chez moi.
translations.it: Guardiamo il servizio insieme a casa mia.
translations.ko: 우리 집에서 같이 그 리포트를 보고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在我家一起看那条报道。
translations.yue: 我哋喺我屋企一齊睇嗰條報導。
translations.ru: Мы вместе смотрим этот репортаж у меня дома.
translations.pt: Estamos assistindo à reportagem juntos na minha casa.
translations.he: אנחנו צופים בכתבה יחד אצלי בבית.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang xem phóng sự cùng nhau ở nhà tôi.
translations.ar: نحن نشاهد التقرير معًا في بيتي.
translations.nl: We kijken de reportage samen bij mij thuis.
translations.uk: Ми разом дивимося цей репортаж у мене вдома.
translations.hi: हम मेरे घर पर साथ में वह रिपोर्ट देख रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Oglądamy ten reportaż razem u mnie w domu.
translations.el: Βλέπουμε το ρεπορτάζ μαζί στο σπίτι μου.
translations.nb: Vi ser reportasjen sammen hos meg.
translations.id: Kami menonton liputan itu bersama di rumah saya.
translations.sv: Vi tittar på reportaget tillsammans hemma hos mig.
translations.ro: Ne uităm la reportaj împreună la mine acasă.
translations.cs: Díváme se na reportáž spolu u mě doma.
translations.da: Vi ser reportagen sammen hjemme hos mig.
translations.ja: 私の家で一緒にその特集を見ています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; main predicate.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Reportage' (direct object).
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'schauen' (accusative).

Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, dative; object of 'bei' (prepositional complement: 'at my place').

es: Estoy leyendo un reportaje sobre la ciudad.
Está grabando un reportaje en el parque.
El reportaje se emite esta noche en la tele.
Estamos viendo el reportaje juntos en mi casa.

Elle tourne un reportage au parc.
Le reportage passe à la télé ce soir.
On regarde le reportage ensemble chez moi.

Sta girando un servizio al parco.
Il servizio va in onda stasera in TV.
Guardiamo il servizio insieme a casa mia.

우리 집에서 같이 그 리포트를 보고 있어요.

我们在我家一起看那条报道。

Мы вместе смотрим этот репортаж у меня дома.

Ela está filmando uma reportagem no parque.
A reportagem vai ao ar hoje à noite na TV.

he: אנחנו צופים בכתבה יחד אצלי בבית.

Ze filmt een reportage in het park.

hu: Épp egy riportot forgat a parkban.
A riport ma este lesz a tévében.
